## What
Brief description of the change.

## Why
Context and motivation.

## How
Implementation approach.

## Checklist
- [ ] `make build` clean (zero errors, zero warnings)
- [ ] `make test` pass (all tests green)
- [ ] Coverage not decreased
- [ ] Accessibility labels added for new UI elements
- [ ] Anti-slop audit: no opacity backgrounds, Sentence Case, 8pt grid
- [ ] No force unwrapping (`!`, `try!`, `as!`)
- [ ] No `print()` — use `Log.xxx` (OSLog)
- [ ] No `Timer.publish` — use `.task` or `TimelineView`
- [ ] No hardcoded colors or spacing values
- [ ] Penjelasan ke user dalam Bahasa Indonesia
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if user-facing change)
